metadata.source: Follow-up from Live Register v1 first slice.

title: Overlay live focus in repo-balls
goal: Surface active thread focus and focus overrides in repo-balls as operational context while keeping registry/queue.json as the dispatch canon.

acceptance.assertion: repo-balls reports active live focus per repo when present.
The overlay is marked projection-only and never becomes a second queue.
Regression tests prove queue projection remains unchanged.
